name: BOM Item-node
label: Node
description: The Kit Content Node that this BOM component maps to. Set automatically when this BOM is generated from a Kit Content Mapping. Previously stored as a breadcrumb path; now a Link to the node master for navigability — the field value is just the direct node name.

name: BOM-explosion_level
label: Explosion Level
description: Populated automatically on every FG BOM generated from a Kit Content Mapping. "Fully Exploded" when the BOM is broken down to purchase-level items; otherwise "From - <comma-separated names of the direct Subassemblies left unexploded as line items>".

name: Sales Order-custom_material_status
label: Material Status
options:
Reprioritize
Inspected
Ready to Dispatch
Needs Attention
Possible to Push
Planning Pending
description: Computed operational status resolved by a fixed precedence chain (see playground/playground/sales_order_hooks.py). Read-only: set by the hourly scheduler and targeted recompute hooks (reservation submit/cancel, snapshot submit, SO save). Blank means none of the six rules matched.

name: Sales Order-custom_inspection_completed
label: Inspection Completed
description: Manual tick set once the order has passed inspection. Drives the "Inspected" Material Status (rank 2, outranks Ready to Dispatch).

name: Sales Order-delivery_date_revision_count
label: Delivery Date Revision Count
description: Counts how many times custom_updated_delivery_date changed via a standard Sales Order form/controller save. Intentionally does NOT count FGSRM's Dispatch Priority Date edits (those use db.set_value and bypass validate). >4 drives "Needs Attention" (rank 4).
